subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out! We appreciate Partner Corp's interest in exploring a collaboration.

We'd be happy to arrange an introductory call this coming week. Could you suggest a couple of time slots that work on your end? We'll do our best to accommodate.

Regarding the contact details you requested — I'm not able to share internal directory information or direct phone lines, but I can help coordinate getting the right people involved on our side once we've established the initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
